title: Remote Work Trends for Creative Professionals in Quebec
description: Study on remote and hybrid work adoption in Quebec's creative sector. Data on salaries, remote-friendly companies, South Shore coworking.

schemas.headline: Remote Work Trends for Creative Professionals in Quebec (2026)
schemas.description: Comprehensive study on remote/hybrid work adoption in Quebec's creative sector, including South Shore hubs, salary impacts, and Bill 96 regulations.
